title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Casa Grande - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Casa Grande - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Casa Grande. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Casa Grande:
Casa Grande is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Casa Grande!
